title: RJD’s Manoj Jha: ‘A reluctant govt’s agreement to a caste census is not the destination. It is the start. Oppn is alert, will watch it closely’
description: "Caste census was the idea of Bahujan politicians like Lalu ji, Mulayam ji, Sharad Yadav ji... This ownership cannot be robbed by anyone. I hope BJP govt does not have Bihar polls in mind"

title: CWG taint fading, but is a comeback too wishful for Suresh Kalmadi, the face of Pune, friend of Pawar to Gandhis?
description: A Delhi court has accepted ED’s closure report on money laundering allegations against Kalmadi. There have been calls to bring back the leader who once dominated Pune politics and the local Congress for close to three decades.

title: Caste census: Stalled Mandal report to still-born SECC, BJP readies its case against Congress
description: Party will underline that it is BJP govt that took reforms such as GST, Aadhaar and now caste census to logical conclusion. To the world, the message post-Pahalgam is, govt’s work has not stopped.

title: New Mumbai Police chief joins Devendra Fadnavis’s expanding inner circle in choice posts
description: Murmurs of discontent in ally Shiv Sena, with leaders saying the CM should give similar space to its ministers “space” to appoint bureaucrats of their choice in departments they hold

title: CWC to meet today to discuss Pahalgam, caste census; likely to pass resolutions
description: On caste census, Congress asks govt, ‘Headline toh de diya, lekin deadline kaha hai?’

title: ‘Half Akhilesh, half Ambedkar’: Why an SP poster has BJP, BSP fuming
description: The controversy comes at a time when the SP is trying to reach out to Dalit voters as part of its “PDA strategy” that brought it success in the Lok Sabha polls last year

title: Rise and fall of Bengal CPI(M) veteran: Face in Jyoti Basu, Buddhadeb Cabinets to expulsion
description: CPI(M) expels Bansa Gopal Chowdhury, former MP and party heavyweight in Bardhaman-Asansol industrial belt, for “sexual misconduct” on a complaint lodged by a woman party leader; he denies the charges

title: Today in Politics: Caste census is back in focus, with an unexpected BJP move
description: Whether the Congress and the Opposition have the firepower to convince the people that the BJP government’s decision came under sustained pressure from them will be the next test.

title: Why now? On sure footing, Govt changes course to take the big step, announces Caste Census
description: In public, the BJP and its leaders often parried questions and were non-committal on the need for a caste census. They, however, regularly targeted the Congress, accusing it of using caste to divide the society.

title: The caste surveys before: What Bihar, Telangana and Karnataka reports found
description: On Modi govt's caste census move, JD(U) in poll-bound Bihar hailed Nitish Kumar, Telangana CM Revanth Reddy gave credit to Rahul Gandhi, while CM Siddaramiah urged the Centre to adopt “Karnataka model”

title: Caste census: Rahul claims ‘made Modi govt implement our vision’. Will it cut ice as BJP raises heat?
description: For two years, Rahul Gandhi has made caste census the centrepiece of his social justice agenda. Govt announcement to hold the same comes with pointed attacks at the Congress.

title: The last caste census was in 1931. A look back at its findings
description: The key question British officials faced was fluidity, mobility and regional changeability of caste identity, with the Census putting OBC numbers at 52% of the then 271 million population

title: As Modi govt announces caste census, how a UPA bid collapsed, amid claims of ‘inaccuracies’
description: The data of a Socio Economic and Caste Census done by Manmohan Singh govt in 2011 has not been released yet. In an affidavit to Supreme Court in 2021, Modi govt cited its "46 lakh different castes" number as one stumbling point

title: JNU is one chapter in ABVP’s growth story from Ladakh to Goa, with BJP’s rise clearing the way
description: This time ABVP has split honours with Left in one of Marxism’s strongest hubs in JNU, School of Social Sciences

title: Haryana DSP ‘apologises’ to BJP leader, Saini govt faces heat from Opposition
description: Incident involves former Odisha governor Ganeshi Lal’s son Manish Singla who is active in Haryana BJP, CM Saini's office says nothing wrong if two people solve an issue between themselves

title: 21 Manipur NDA MLAs write to Centre seeking ‘popular govt’ in state: ‘Only means to bring peace and normalcy’
description: The signatories do not include former Chief Minister N. Biren Singh or any of the MLAs and former ministers who remained close to him during his tenure as Chief Minister.

title: Eye on Pasi vote, Tejashwi, Chirag bat for toddy exemption from liquor, corner Nitish
description: BJP hits out at Tejashwi, saying RJD backed "total prohibition" when the law was passed in 2016; JD(U) accuses RJD of “U-turn”, daring it to seek views of women voters.

title: Can Digha temple cancel out Murshidabad violence? Mamata Banerjee will be praying for that today
description: BJP says Jagannath Dham to be inaugurated by Bengal CM a cultural centre, not temple; unveils own plans to "restore" temples in Murshidabad

title: Today in Politics: In aftermath of Pahalgam attack, PM Modi to chair series of meetings
description: Rahul to visit victim’s kin in Kanpur; AIPMLB to hold “switch off lights” protest against Waqf Act; Mamata to attend Jagannath Temple inauguration in Digha

title: Pahalgam heat on Muslim MLA of Bhopal, BJP leader stands by ‘threat to his life’
description: Krishna Ghadge, BJP working committee member, calls Arif Masood “Pak agent”, says “won’t leave him”

title: Bengaluru civic corporation set to be split, no early end to 10-year wait for polls
description: Congress govt’s Bill to break BBMP into smaller corporations has got the Governor’s assent; BJP continues to oppose, says will cause “uneven growth”

title: ‘Centre should think about Maoists’ peace talks offer’: Andhra ex-Home Minister who led 2004 dialogue with rebels
description: “Both sides should cooperate to bring about a peaceful environment with mutual understanding,” says K Jana Reddy, of Maoists' offer for peace amidst a crackdown against them, including a massive ongoing operation in Chhattisgarh

title: More land on its wish list, TDP govt courts farmers as guests for Amaravati relaunch
description: Farmers to attend event where PM coming, Andhra CM Chandrababu Naidu, who needs 30,000-40,000 acres for the capital, hails farmers' "sacrifice".

title: Divided Haryana Congress hopes it is third time lucky in bid to revamp organisation
description: The start is not good so far as Bhupinder Singh Hooda is accused of again cornering most of the posts in panels for his men

title: Alternative reading of Bhima Koregaon: How a Maharashtra outfit is trying to advance Dalit cause from Hindutva orbit
description: While Dalit activism is generally understood as resistance to “Brahmanical Hinduism”, the Vivek Vichar Manch’s goal is to foster Hindu unity, something which is also a core ideological goal of the BJP and the Sangh

title: From the Urdu Press: ‘Pakistan in perennial denial mode… must pay for Pahalgam’, ‘Foil terrorists’ communal designs’
description: "The teacher recruitment scandal has shaken public trust in Bengal's school system... It points to a larger crisis afflicting the sector,” writes Roznama Rashtriya Sahara.

title: Bigwigs left out, BJP picks old RSS hand for Andhra Rajya Sabha seat
description: OBC face Paka Venkata Satyanarayana is likely to be elected unopposed; party believes he can be a ‘measured’ voice in Upper House

title: After a little-known Mayor, Gurgaon gets a plus one: her husband as advisor
description: Gurgaon Municipal Commissioner names Mayor Raj Rani Malhotra's spouse Tilak Raj in ‘voluntary advisory’ position as Congress protests; faces second controversy in one month in power

title: In Pahalgam aftermath: Protect growing India story, send a strong message to Pakistan and terror
description: The terrorists must have calculated that killing the tourists on the basis of religion will deepen Hindu-Muslim faultlines across India. The government has to prevent that and, at the same time, let Pakistan know that “enough is enough”.

title: Today in Politics: PM Modi to address YUGM conclave; Rahul Gandhi to visit Raebareli amid state Cong revamp
description: Also, the Supreme Court will hear a batch of pleas on the Pegasus spyware and the Delhi HC will hear the bail plea of the accused in the December 2023 Parliament breach.

title: Now, CBI probe into Pinarayi Vijayan’s top advisor: Who is K M Abraham?
description: CM’s chief principal secretary and Kerala Infrastructure Investment Fund Board CEO, CMO member since 2021, more powerful than Chief Secretary

title: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy, KCR call for outreach towards Maoists as crackdown continues
description: Reddy says his govt looks at "Naxalism only from a social perspective", BRS chief urges the Centre to “stop” anti-Naxal operation in Chhattisgarh; BJP hits back

title: Leaders stray from Congress’s calculated Pahalgam line, land party in familiar dilemma
description: Standing firmly behind govt, while making nuanced points on lapses and countermeasures, was what Congress was going for. But remarks by Siddaramaiah, Soz have provoked a BJP reaction

title: Takeaways from KCR’s first rally in almost 2 years: Invoking Lord Ram to calling for dialogue with Naxals
description: Aware of his party’s slide in rural constituencies in the last two elections, BRS chief reaches out to farmers, targets CM Revanth Reddy for not fulfilling promise to hike aid under Rythu Bandhu Scheme

title: Jayant Chaudhary’s RLD looks beyond West UP, gets ready to move into Haryana, Punjab
description: Party appoints former MLA Jagjeet Singh Sangwan as its Haryana president, plans to get going in Punjab after a meeting in Ludhiana on May 4

title: Today in Politics: Siddaramaiah to hold ‘mega protest’ against Centre’s ‘unchecked price rise’
description: SC may hear plea on regulation of OTT content; Results of JNUSU polls to be out; Congress to hold “Samvidhan bachao” rally in Odisha

title: Tamil Nadu ministers Senthil Balaji, K Ponmudy resign: What’s behind the DMK shake-up?
description: Balaji, a key strategist, may now be redeployed to help strengthen the party in the politically crucial west Tamil Nadu region ahead of the Assembly polls next year.

title: J&K tourism sector hit after Pahalgam attack, how BJP is trying to rebuild confidence of local businesses, remaining visitors
description: PM Modi points out in his “Mann ki Baat” address that the terror attack occurred at a time when “peace was returning to Kashmir … number of tourists was increasing at a record rate”

title: It’s BJP versus its own government in Madhya Pradesh as party tries to set house in order
description: Party tries to control damage after three MLAs speak out against the state administration, office-bearers in some civic bodies also at odds with local BJP leadership

title: First deadline 14 days away, Congress grand rehaul faces trials and errors in pilot state Gujarat
description: The plan to start revamp from district units by selecting six-member panels – starting with Gujarat – must first fight intra-party allegations of complicity with BJP

title: As Pahalgam attack gives fresh ammo to BJP, Suvendu Adhikari leads the charge
description: Adhikari has been sharpening his Hindutva pitch over the last year. After Pahalgam, he has taken it up a notch

title: Today in Politics: Govt’s ‘retaliatory options’ after Pahalgam; Bihar election pitch
description: “There will be military retaliation and we are prepared,” a top source in the government said

title: Decode Politics: Why Maharashtra Cabinet will meet in Ahilyanagar on May 6
description: Last year, the Mahayuti government renamed both Ahmednagar district and the city as Ahilyanagar as part of its strategy to appeal to both Hindus and Dhangars.

title: Pahalgam attack fallout: After diplomatic actions, range of retaliatory options on govt’s table
description: Since Pulwama in 2019, India has acquired capabilities to strike from within its borders

title: More than 7% of its population migrating for jobs, why ‘palayan’ is top Bihar poll plank
description: Data shows that Bihar is second only to UP in terms of out-migrants and those who moved to other states for jobs, with the state having the highest multidimensional poverty rate in the country

title: Held for ‘sedition’ over Pahalgam remarks, Assam MLA in eye of many a storm: Who is Aminul Islam?
description: Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma accuses AIUDF MLA of “defending Pakistan” over Pahalgam attack, even as AIUDF chief Badruddin Ajmal distances the party from Islam's stance

title: Booked for Jaipur Jama Masjid poster row, BJP MLA no stranger to controversy: Who is Balmukundacharya
description: First-time MLA from Hawa Mahal and Hathoj Dham temple mahant, Balmukundacharya says he participated in a protest against Pahalgam terror attack

title: As SC seeks minimum votes in uncontested polls, a look at when MPs, MLAs got a free pass
description: Currently, under RPA provisions, the winner is declared uncontested if no other candidate in fray. Since first polls, 29 MPs, 298 MLAs have been declared unelected thus. Here is the data

title: Today in Politics: As Tamil Nadu Governor Ravi ups the ante in row with DMK, why AIADMK, BJP may be feeling uneasy
description: After R N Ravi alleges police stopped state university V-Cs from attending a conference hosted by him, DMK MP says such “false statements that tend to excite subversive activities" against the state government "constitute a serious crime".

title: Why Nitish Kumar singled out Lalan Singh for JD(U)’s ‘mistake’ of exiting NDA in 2022
description: According to party insiders, the Union Minister’s alleged proximity to Lalu Prasad reportedly caused the rift with the Bihar CM, and things have not been the same since.

title: In tussle with Stalin govt, another blow for Governor Ravi: One-third turn up for his V-C meet
description: Raj Bhavan had tried to impress that this was no power play with the DMK govt after Supreme Court rebuff. But state varsity V-Cs stay away from Ooty conference

title: Was SDPI involved in Murshidabad violence? As BJP levels charges, party defends fight against amended Waqf law
description: The SDPI, which denies links to the now-banned Popular Front of India, has a presence in 12 districts in West Bengal but continues to remain a marginal force in state politics.

title: Devendra Fadnavis and Eknath Shinde’s tango over Pahalgam relief efforts
description: Devendra Fadnavis-Eknath Shinde On Pahalgam Terror Attack: After the CM deputes BJP leaders and ministers for Srinagar and airport duty, the Deputy CM and Shiv Sena lands in Kashmir himself and sends out his own

title: J-K Congress face: ‘Tourists have said Pahalgam had no security or checks… so attackers did not face any challenge’
description: “Such acts (like Pahalgam attack) are not supported by anyone in Kashmir... Tourism in Kashmir is not because of someone’s publicity. Tourists love Kashmir and Kashmiri people love them,” says J&K CLP leader Ghulam Ahmad Mir

title: Today in Politics: Rahul to visit Pahalgam attack survivors, Congress to hold candlelight marches
description: For the first time in a decade, a divided Left to contest JNUSU polls; AIMIM set to win Telangana MLC election

title: Opposition backs Centre on steps against terror, questions Pahalgam security ‘lapse’
description: Attack site was "active without security since April 20, Opposition pointed out that it was a huge security lapse", says AAP's Sanjay Singh; Rahul Gandhi asks how such a lapse can happen when a three-tier security is in place

title: Pakistan suspends Simla Agreement: What is the pact Indira Gandhi, Zulfikar Ali Bhutto signed in 1972?
description: The agreement signed in the wake of the 1971 war, which Pakistan lost, ought to “put an end to conflict and confrontation”, with Delhi and Islamabad vowing not to “alter the LoC unilaterally, irrespective of mutual differences and legal interpretations”

title: SP to raise issues of ‘targeted social media campaigns’ at all-party meet on Pahalgam attack
description: Party chief Akhilesh Yadav extends supports to Centre’s decisions and calls for stricter measures

title: Congress sharpens Pahalgam stand, talks about  ‘lapses’, accuses BJP of ‘sowing discord’
description: CWC takeaways: A day after Cong said it was not time for “partisan politics” but for "collective resolve", most leaders feel it should also highlight security, intelligence issues; Rahul to visit Kashmir to meet the injured Friday

title: PM Modi’s message to Pahalgam attackers, their ‘backers’: ‘Mitti mein milaane ka samay aa gaya hai’
description: In his first speech after the April 22 attack  PM switches to English to make his point, underlines geographical spread of victims to call for unity beyond linguistic differences.

title: Decode Politics: In judiciary battle, BJP and Congress take aim at old ghosts. Who are Baharul Islam and Gumanmal Lodha?
description: Nishikant Dubey speaks of Islam’s association with Congress “while holding judicial positions”. Khera responds with Lodha links to the Jana Sangh

title: Today in Politics: All-party meetings in Parliament, J&K in wake of Pahalgam terror attack
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is scheduled to visit Bihar to address Panchayati Raj Institution across the country. An emergency meeting of the Congress Working Committee will also be held in New Delhi on the Pahalgam attack

title: Decode Politics: Indira Gandhi’s favourite yoga guru, and an ashram caught in a row now for 30 years
description: The prime 24-acre property in Gurgaon is mired in legislation between two sides, with the BJP government passing a Bill recently to take it over and “protect” it from private players

title: Art 142: Dubbed ‘nuclear missile’ by V-P Dhankhar, deployed by SC in cases from Ayodhya to Bhopal to Visakha
description: Article 142, which grants the apex court the power to pass any order necessary to ensure “complete justice”, was used sparingly until there was a spike in the 1990s amidst much political upheaval in country.

title: Haunted by R G Kar stir, Mamata watches warily as teachers dig in heels, strike a chord
description: The sacked teachers have launched an indefinite sit-in against TMC govt to demand a list of “tainted” and “untainted” teachers, which has drawn support from civil society, Oppn

title: US-based right-wing body to release documentary to debunk ‘myth of caste discrimination’
description: Titled The Caste Rush, the documentary claims to fight the “false narrative” on the issue in India as well as the US, through testimonies of temple priests across the country.

title: Are Governors needed? SC ruling on TN Bills, BJP MPs’ attack on Court raise the question
description: No action has been taken so far against the errant MPs. This is curious, as BJP is not known to dilly-dally once it has decided to take action. And Nishikant Dubey’s remarks were no small matter

title: P Chidambaram on Kashmir: ‘Govt should weigh its options and choose the most effective one. Congress will support it’
description: “The restoration of statehood is a separate issue but is absolutely necessary… However, it has nothing to do with terrorist incidents,” former Union Home Minister says

title: Ground below it slipping in Andhra, YSRCP tries multi-pronged attacks to take on TDP govt
description: From cow deaths to assault of Dalits to arrest of officials seen as close to YSRCP chief Jagan Mohan Reddy, party steps up campaigns

title: Tapping into ‘Brahmin vs Thakur’ narrative, SP takes up the cause of Brahmins in UP
description: Accusations by Akhilesh of the Yogi government “favouring” Thakurs in police postings follow the SP raising instances of varied cases of assaults against Brahmins

title: Terrorist outfit lays claim to J&K tourist attack: What is The Resistance Front
description: A proxy of Pakistan-based Lashkar-e-Taiba, TRF began as an online entity in the wake of abrogation of Article 370 and revocation of J&K special status in August 2019

title: As Thackeray cousins inch closer, why Eknath Shinde is worried he may be squeezed out
description: A tie-up with Raj’s MNS will bolster Uddhav’s Shiv Sena ahead of BMC polls, put a shadow over Shinde’s claims to Thackeray legacy

title: As Opposition raises heat, Mamata sets a date   for Murshidabad visit, TMC prepares ground
description: BJP, CPI(M) and Cong have all questioned CM’s "absence" from violence-hit areas. But with tempers high still, she will go only in May

title: As V-P Jagdeep Dhankhar says ‘no authority above Parliament’, a look at his previous run-ins with the judiciary
description: The very day he assumed charge as Chairman of the Rajya Sabha, in December 2022, Jagdeep Dhankhar had hit out at the apex court over its decision to scrap the NJAC.

title: From the Urdu Press: ‘Current dispensation wants to bulldoze judiciary too’, ‘SC ruling shows Urdu a bridge, not a wall’
description: “Rather than looking to extract political mileage, petitioners in the SC against Waqf Amendment Act need to dedicate themselves to the cause in the interest of the Muslim community”: Siasat

title: Decode Politics: Rahul asks Cong govts to enact ‘Rohith Vemula Act’. Where do the states stand?
description: A pre-poll promise by the party, the proposed legislation aims to prevent caste-based discrimination in educational institutions

title: Newsmaker: A S Dulat, the ‘spy’ who never left Kashmir
description: NC’s rage over his claim in a book regarding Farooq Abdullah brings together the two aspects of the former R&AW chief’s long career: his long engagement with Kashmir, and his longer friendships there

title: In time for next year’s Assembly polls, BJP makes crucial pivots in Kerala, Tamil Nadu
description: Moderation of Hindutva stand and acceptance of AIADMK as the senior partner are all steps to bolster party in the two southern states where it has been trying to grow its footprint

title: Amid language row, a look at how BJP brass tilted to Hindi, shed English after Vajpayee era
description: “The last decade marked a period when the masses became wary of the anglicised elite... The BJP's current leadership is in sync with mass expectations in Hindi-speaking states, where the party is a dominant player,” says a BJP leader

title: Amidst BJP overhaul, calls for better coordination with RSS
description: Coordination meetings were earlier held around once a month between the BJP and Sangh to discuss issues with “a national focus”. According to sources, these have become "more and more rare” over the last five to six years

title: Left a divided house, ABVP looks to capitalise in JNU student body polls
description: That’s because, for the first time in nearly a decade, the Left, which has been dominant on the campus for decades, is a divided force.

title: Delhi Mayor: Shrunken AAP stays out, claims has left ‘four-engine’ BJP in a tight spot
description: Numbers not in favour of Arvind Kejriwal’s party in the tight race. But AAP claims it has a plan in handing mayor and deputy mayor posts on a platter to BJP

title: Today in Politics: RN Ravi’s conference with VCs sets stage for new battle with DMK
description: RSS, BJP and allies feel the conference will appear to be defiance on the part of the Governor, thus feeding the DMK’s federalist campaign and putting them in a tight spot.

title: Six months and no LoP in Haryana from Congress, Saini govt considers ‘legal options’
description: For several posts, LoP is required as a member of selection panels. But faction-ridden Congress no closer to deciding a name.

title: As AIADMK, BJP look to get going in Tamil Nadu, why R N Ravi has complicated matters
description: Governor’s plan to host a conference of Vice-Chancellors in Ooty faces criticism from DMK-led ruling coalition, concern in NDA camp too

title: Waqf Act: In assurance to SC, Centre pauses same provisions it had defended in Parliament
description: On both the appointment of non-Muslims to Waqf boards and ‘Waqf-by-user’ properties, the Centre had rejected the concerns raised by Opposition, accused it of spreading “misconception”

title: Why Chirag Paswan’s ‘Bihar first’ refrain has caused a flutter in NDA before polls
description: BJP, JD(U) camps link Chirag’s “Bihar is calling me” pitch to his “bargaining bid for more seats” in the Assembly polls, with LJP(RV) staking claim to 40 seats.

title: Newsmaker | BJP picks its Delhi mayor candidate: Who is Raja Iqbal Singh?
description: A long-time Akali Dal worker who shifted to the BJP during the farm agitation, Singh was in the spotlight for the Jahangirpuri demolitions.

title: Amritpal Singh’s detention extended, bets are off on who gains the most
description: The Waris Punjab De leader’s silence on Khalistan has not helped him get out of NSA. So does AAP govt gain for its “strict” stand, sympathy vote go to Congress, or Akali Dal standing among Sikhs erode further?

title: Today in Politics: PM Modi-US V-P Vance meet; Rahul at Brown University
description: PM to address civil servants; Mamata to inaugurate thermal power plant

title: Will Uddhav, Raj Thackeray join forces? Road to reunion full of potential pitfalls, but why the alliance may work
description: Uddhav, Raj Thackeray Reunion:  “If they contest alone, failure is almost a certainty. But if they show maturity and join hands, they have a pretty good chance of emerging stronger,” says senior Sena (UBT) leader working to bring the estranged cousins together.

title: ‘Attack on Constitution’: After BJP MPs’ comments on judiciary, Congress senses opportunity, plans to corner government
description: Jairam Ramesh labels comments by Nishikant Dubey "a warning shot"; Pawan Khera alleges BJP “opening a front” against the judiciary.

title: Bill for Holi party passed on to government, Himachal Chief Secretary faces questions: Who is Prabodh Saxena?
description: The Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu government is also receiving pushback from the BJP for granting Saxena a six-month extension.

title: The other BJP leader who left party red-faced with remarks on judiciary: Who is Dinesh Sharma?
description: Sharma, a former Lucknow Mayor, served as one of the two UP Deputy CMs in the first Yogi Adityanath government. This is not the first time his comments have caused a row.

title: Newsmaker | BJP’s agent provocateur Nishikant Dubey does it again, this time with attack on CJI
description: From starting Women’s Reservation Bill debate to targeting the Congress, the party has often turned to the Jharkhand MP to lead the way.

title: BJP leader: ‘Land of Hindus encroached too … we need somebody to hear their side. Hence, two non-Muslims in Waqf boards’
description: "NDA allies are not worried ... Our campaign flags that the new Waqf law is entirely pro-Muslim," says Radha Mohan Das Agrawal, who is leading a BJP committee tasked with campaigning across the country about the benefits of the amended law.

title: Eyeing Bihar polls, Nitish steps up women outreach: feedback on schemes, prohibition
description: Nitish dispensation banks on SHGs to “act as a link” between JD(U) and women voters; RJD calls Mahila Samvad campaign “misuse of government money”

title: Why Congress, CPI(M) have softened their anti-Waqf stand in Kerala
description: Despite strongly opposing amended Waqf law at the national level, both CPI(M), Cong have refrained from holding any protests against it in Kerala as they do not want to “alienate” their Hindu, Christian bases

title: Today in Politics: BJP to launch nationwide awareness campaign on Waqf amendments
description: In West Bengal, the National Commission for Women is set to call on Governor C V Ananda Bose, among others, over the communal violence in Murshidabad

title: After BJP’s Dubey says CJI behind ‘civil wars’, J P Nadda says told him not to make such statements
description: When contacted after Nadda’s public posts, Dubey said he would follow the party line. “I am a disciplined soldier of the party. I will go by what the party says,” he told The Indian Express.

title: Today in Politics: BJP to launch nationwide awareness campaign on Waqf amendments
description: In West Bengal, the National Commission for Women is set to call on Governor C V Ananda Bose, among others, over the communal violence in Murshidabad

title: After BJP’s Dubey says CJI behind ‘civil wars’, J P Nadda says told him not to make such statements
description: When contacted after Nadda’s public posts, Dubey said he would follow the party line. “I am a disciplined soldier of the party. I will go by what the party says,” he told The Indian Express.

title: Naveen Patnaik returns to BJD helm for 9th term, flags ‘Odisha rights’ to counter BJP’s ‘Odia Asmita’
description: Patnaik manages to tackle the rumblings within BJD over the Waqf row, asks party rank and file to aggressively “expose” BJP's “false narrative”, especially in social media.

title: Flagging ‘Maharashtra interest’, Uddhav, Raj signal thaw as questions hover over reunion
description: Estranged Thackeray cousins make reconciliatory remarks ahead of the coming BMC polls, even as Uddhav remains wary of Raj’s stance on BJP.

title: Why Congress remains silent on ED action against Robert Vadra as BJP dials up heat
description: Congress insiders say the move not to defend Vadra and to distance the party from him was a “calculated decision” as he doesn’t hold a post in the party and has never been associated with it in any formal capacity

title: Caste surveys done, and undone: 107 yrs on, a story repeats in Karnataka
description: From Vokkaliga and Lingayat protests, to questions over numbers, the state has seen it all every time it has done a count to determine backward classes.

title: Allies again, why AIADMK, BJP face uphill battle against DMK in 2026 Tamil Nadu polls
description: In 2024 LS polls, AIADMK, BJP took on each other in 20 seats involving 115 Assembly segments, but their combined vote share there would have exceeded that of the victor DMK-led alliance in only 42 segments

title: Today in Politics: AIMIM and All India Muslim Board to protest against Waqf Act
description: AIMIM chief and Hyderabad MP Asaduddin Owaisi filed among the first set of petitions against the law saying it “manifestly arbitrary, perpetuates discrimination on grounds of religion

title: Now, Hindi in NEP row in Maharashtra, and why it is different from South
description: The timing seems to have aligned for the Opposition, with the local body polls coming up. A wary BJP is treading carefully on the issue as it does not want to be seen as being anti-Marathi.

title: Congress Madhya Pradesh upgrade plan focuses on stage size, speech length
description: In March, a stage collapsed at a Congress event in Bhopal during a Vidhan Sabha gherao event. This prompted the party to come up with a set of guidelines to combat indiscipline in its ranks.

title: As former BJP Bengal chief Dilip Ghosh gets married, state parties united in bliss
description: Mamata Banerjee sends wishes and sweets for wedding of Dilip Ghosh, 60, to BJP Mahila Morcha leader Rinku Majumdar

title: NSCN (I-M) founder’s son to join dissident faction in Myanmar: Why it could be bad news for Naga peace deal
description: Ikato Chishi Swu, son of the late Isak Chishi Swu, announces he is siding with Lt Gen (retired) Hs Ramsan and Lt Gen Absalom Raman, both of whom firmly believe in armed struggle.

title: Abhishek Manu Singhvi: ‘No one’s asking for stay on entire Waqf (Amendment) Act … when Governors act like Centre’s agents, how is use of Article 142 wrong?’
description: "I disagree very strongly (with V-P Jagdeep Dhankhar's criticism of the use of Article 142). It was Dr Ambedkar and the framers who thought it fit to trust our Supreme Court and the Supreme Court alone with this special power," says Congress Rajya Sabha MP.

title: In Murshidabad, ‘absent’ Yusuf Pathan draws fire from Opposition, locals; TMC MP, MLA join in
description: TMC officially defends the cricketer-turned-party MP, highlighting that the violence-hit areas in Murshidabad district are not part of his Baharampur constituency

title: INDIA bloc begins Bihar poll prep, Tejashwi Yadav to head coordination panel
description: Mahagathbandhan’s first election meeting a “win-win” for RJD and Congress, say insiders. While RJD succeeds in projecting Tejashwi as the alliance’s face, Congress keeps discussions on leadership, seat sharing for later.

title: Why Akhilesh Yadav’s meeting with a Congress leader has the party nervous
description: The SP chief addressed a press conference with former Union Minister and Odisha Congress leader Srikant Kumar Jena on Wednesday. This comes at a time when the SP is learnt to be keen on establishing its presence in the eastern state.

title: PM Modi headed to Mithilanchal, why NDA  is betting big on the region for Bihar polls
description: PM Modi is expected to address a rally in Madhubani on April 24 as the ruling BJP-JD(U) alliance steps up bid to consolidate support base in its stronghold

title: Why AIADMK chief EPS has ruled out ‘power-sharing with BJP’
description: Alliance works “only arithmetically, chemistry still broken ... whether we win or not, it won’t survive much longer", says an AIADMK leader.

title: Today in Politics: Waqf hearing continues in SC, with possibility of stay on parts of Act
description: Karnataka Cabinet to discuss caste survey report amidst rift in party

title: Alliance on the menu? Eknath Shinde-Raj Thackeray dinner meeting creates a flutter
description: Maharashtra Deputy CM visited MNS chief’s home to attempt to mend their ties, it is learnt. Last year, Shinde had refused to withdraw candidate against Thackeray’s son in the Assembly polls.

title: Singed by Murshidabad violence, TMC MLAs, MP scramble to connect with people amid rift
description: Several TMC legislators faced Waqf protesters' ire in the party stronghold, even as a party section slam some of their leaders for “failing” to prevent violence or anticipate it

title: As BJP gets close to electing a new president, party prepares for organisational revamp
description: Nomination process for next party chief's election likely to begin after April 20, say insiders

title: Amid DMK’s federalism push, a look at 3 panels that studied Centre-State relations: What they recommended
description: While Karunanidhi set up the Rajamannar Committee in Tamil Nadu in 1969, the Sarkaria Commission, formed in 1983 amid the rise of regional parties, and the Punchhi Commission in 2007 were set up by the Union government.

title: Storm brews in Kashmir over Dulat’s book: ‘A friend can’t write like this,’ says Farooq Abdullah on Article 370 claims
description: PDP, Sajad Lone’s party tear into National Conference president: ‘It’s clear that Farooq sahab chose to stay in Kashmir instead of the Parliament to help normalise gutting of J&Ks constitution and subsequent betrayal’

title: ‘Bhim Sansad’ to ‘Bhim Mahakumbh’: Eye on Bihar polls, Nitish doubles down on Dalit outreach
description: JD(U)'s renewed Dalit pitch is being seen as part of its efforts to stem the decline of its electoral fortunes as the party saw its Assembly tally fall from 71 seats in 2015 to 43 in 2020.
